name: IRC_CX_SITES_VL
query: SELECT B.SITE_ID SITE_ID, B.OBJECT_STATUS, B.OBJECT_VERSION_NUMBER OBJECT_VERSION_NUMBER, B.SITE_CODE SITE_CODE, B.SITE_NUMBER SITE_NUMBER, B.ACTIVE_THEME_ID ACTIVE_THEME_ID, B.DEFAULT_LANG, TL.SITE_NAME SITE_NAME, B.CREATED_BY CREATED_BY, B.CREATION_DATE CREATION_DATE, B.LAST_UPDATED_BY LAST_UPDATED_BY, B.LAST_UPDATE_DATE LAST_UPDATE_DATE, B.LAST_UPDATE_LOGIN LAST_UPDATE_LOGIN, B.SEQUENCE_NUMBER, B.STATUS_CODE, B.EMAIL_TEMPLATE_ID, B.SITE_TYPE, B.EVENTS_ENABLED_FLAG, TL.OG_IMAGE_SRC, B.SITE_URL_NAME, TL.SMART_SEARCH_SUGGESTION SMART_SEARCH_SUGGESTION, TL.SEO_ORGANIZATION_NAME SEO_ORGANIZATION_NAME, TL.SEO_ORGANIZATION_SAME_AS SEO_ORGANIZATION_SAME_AS, TL.SEO_ORGANIZATION_LOGO SEO_ORGANIZATION_LOGO, TL.SEO_DESCRIPTION SEO_DESCRIPTION, TL.SEO_KEYWORDS SEO_KEYWORDS FROM IRC_CX_SITES_B B, IRC_CX_SITES_TL TL WHERE B.SITE_ID = TL.SITE_ID AND TL.LANGUAGE = USERENV('LANG')
